headline: Fortegra Appoints Iwan Röpcke as Chief Executive Officer, Belgium
summary: BRUSSELS, May 08, 2026--The Fortegra Group, Inc., a global specialty insurer, today announced the appointment of Iwan Röpcke as Chief Executive Officer, Belgium.

headline: Insurance Brokers Q1 2026 Update
summary: Insurance brokers are currently in a world of pain as the halcyon days of the hard market are clearly behind us.
